line: | fields _time host source user action status bytes duration uri_path _raw
| lookup service_catalog uri_path OUTPUTNEW service owner tier
| eventstats avg(duration_ms) AS service_average BY service
| streamstats window=5 current=true avg(duration_ms) AS moving_average BY host
| rename service AS "Service", owner AS "Team Owner"
| table Service "Team Owner" tier severity requests total_bytes average_ms p95_ms
``` Multivalue and JSON extraction remain a separate, readable search. ```
| stats values(label) AS labels list(position) AS positions BY event_name
| table event_name labels positions fallback payload_type
``` Time-series commands, numeric functions, and date functions. ```
| timechart span=5m avg(value) AS utilization BY host limit=20 useother=false
| predict utilization AS forecast algorithm=LLP5 future_timespan=12
| chart sum(revenue) AS revenue over region BY product limit=12
| top limit=10 product BY region showcount=true showperc=true
``` Correlation with subsearches, append families, and set operations. ```
| table order_id state paid amount total_on_hand
| stats count earliest(_time) AS first latest(_time) AS last BY stream host
| replace "n/a" WITH null IN sender recipient
| geostats latfield=client_lat lonfield=client_lon count BY destination
| stats avg(reading) AS reading BY _time device
| rangemap field=reading cold=0-15 normal=16-25 hot=26-100 default=unknown
| table _time device reading range cluster_label CLUSTERNUM
``` Input, output, REST, and SQL-bearing commands use fully closed strings. ```
